case_title: LVNV FUNDING, LLC VS. MARCO CASTRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO $1,975.98 PRINCIPAL, $396.63 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,372.61, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-11-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100045755), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK SERVED FEB-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-25-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $396.63 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62891952) AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 62403298) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 62870739) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [C.C.P. 1033] (TRANSACTION ID # 62891952) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK
NOTICE OF CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 62403298) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62870739) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 62891952) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC , ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
